race.comment: TERRITORY MAN (5) is a progressive talent on the way up, scoring by 1.9L in an impressive return at this track and trip. This is tougher, but his figures say he's right up to it and there looks to be improvement to come. Pike sticks, he maps favourably and he can go back-to-back. CLOSE AT HAND (1) is racing in good order at Kalgoorlie and now makes the trip to town. ZJP's claim is a bonus and the wide draw doesn't hurt with his racing pattern. Can feature in the finish again. MONTE TREMEZZO (10) wasn't far away fresh behind a smart one and looks better suited here. Has upside and can put her best foot forward. ROMANTIC RULER (11) is third-up now and can give some cheek from the inside barrier.
